_note: Canned deterministic A/B DIVERGENCE tape — EXTREME RESIDUAL ABSTAIN + CANCEL. Same warmup basis (gap 0.05) as tape_divergence_pull; the fourth tick's FV JUMPS to 0.65 so the guarded residual (0.15 - 0.05 = 0.10) BREACHES the extreme wall (extreme_multiple * residual_band = 3.0 * 0.03 = 0.09): arm B fails closed to NO_QUOTE/residual_extreme (a cancel-on-exposure plan when resting; none here). Arm A is FV-blind and quotes BOTH sides (QUOTE_TWO_SIDED). Warmup prefix byte-identical across arms; streams diverge at tick 4 ONLY. Requires overrides ref_min_samples=2, basis_min_samples=2.
